findings.description: Server '@dandeliongold/server-everything' is from an unverified source outside @modelcontextprotocol.
Package '@dandeliongold/server-everything' looks suspiciously like trusted server '@modelcontextprotocol/server-everything' (homoglyph substitution).
findings.details: Verify you meant to install this package and not '@modelcontextprotocol/server-everything'.
